nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 40. East wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Rain Showers Likely then Light Rain Likely
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely between 7am and 1pm, then rain likely and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 55, with temperatures falling to around 50 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms before 8pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 31, with temperatures rising to around 33 overnight. Northwest wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 51. Northwest wind 17 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 32 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 30. Northwest wind 6 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
